prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Alzheimer's Disease
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 94.9 kg; Height 177.6 cm; BMI 30.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 94.1kg; 9 months ago 91.1kg; 6 months ago 91.8kg; 3 months ago 90.9kg; current 94.9kg), Height (12 months ago 177.6cm; 9 months ago 177.6cm; 6 months ago 177.6cm; 3 months ago 177.6cm; current 177.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 44U/L), AST (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 42U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 99mg/g; 9 months ago 134mg/g; 6 months ago 129mg/g; 3 months ago 97mg/g; current 103mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
